judgeReasoning: Excellent separation of completed vs. active work. The [completed-topic] tags make it trivial to skip what's done and focus on the active research partnership and pending methodology work. Clear next steps (read 3 papers, draft protocol). The 'pending-action' section explicitly states what's running (DeepSeek r2, turn 17) and what to do next. Only minor weakness: could be slightly more explicit about prioritization (are the methodology papers the immediate priority, or monitoring the running experiment?).
